title: Civil, Structural and Geotechnical Design Engineer
description:
The Role

The role reports directly to the team lead. He or She is responsible for supporting the Professional Engineers on the design and supervision of new erections, addition and alteration (A&A) work to existing buildings, earth retaining and stabilising systems, specialist designs for the facade, glass, demolition works etc, as well as temporary works. The role may also be required to conduct site inspections.

Responsibilities:

  • Carry out detailed analysis and design of civil, structural, and geotechnical works;
  • Prepare design calculation reports and structural drawings for authorities' submissions;
  • Coordinate with various stakeholders such as clients, consultants, and contractors for projects; and
  • Supervise and inspect construction works;

Requirements:

  • Degree in Civil/Structural Engineering from a recognized Institution;
  • Strong engineering fundamentals and analytical skills in geotechnical and structural analysis and design work would be an advantage;
  • A good knowledge of the application of design and drafting software such as Autocad, Staad Pro, Plaxis, Prota, and Tedds would be an advantage;
  • Fresh graduates and experience candidates are welcome to apply. Experienced candidates may be considered for a more senior position.
  • Passing FEE 1 and FEE 2 are an advantage for senior hires.

About VEngineers

VEngineers Consultancy Pte Ltd is a leading engineering consultancy, founded in Singapore, with design offices in both Singapore and Malaysia. The company was originally founded in 2018 as a sole proprietorship under the name VEngineers. To support its growth and broaden its geographical footprint, the company transitioned toVEngineers Consultancy Pte Ltd in 2020. Our projects now span from Singapore to China, Bhutan, and Cambodia, showcasing our ability to adapt to various design codes and seismic conditions. In 2023, we expanded further by establishing VNM Engineering Sdn Bhd in Malaysia, aiming to collaborate with local consultants on landmark projects across the region. Over the years, we have successfullydelivered a diverse range of civil, structural, and geotechnical engineering projects both locally and abroad.

At VEngineers, innovation is at the core of everything we do. We constantly seek out innovative solutions that create value throughout the building life cycle for all stakeholders in the construction industry. Backed by a team of experienced and dedicated engineers, we are trusted by clients for delivering quality services and value-added solutions over the years. Our commitment to innovation has led to industry collaborations, including the commercialization of the Ultra-High Performance Concrete (UHPC) Prefabricated Bathroom Unit System across four residential projects. We also hold two patents in UHPC Prefabricated Prefinished Volumetric Construction System in Singapore. As we stand at the forefront of the industry, VEngineers continues to explore new ways to enhance productivity and sustainability within the built environment.

Vision:

To be a Civil & Structural (C&S) Consultancy firm recognised for innovative engineering solutions that are created in the course of work.

Mission:

To engineer construction solutions that create new values for all building stakeholders.

Why Join Us?

We offer attractive remuneration packages that commensurate with performance and work experience;

  • Flexibenefits, Medical, rand Dental
  • 13th AWS and Performance Bonus
  • Group Insurance
  • Training Grant and Education support,
  • Miscellaneous allowance,
  • Blue Sky Friday
  • Bonding Events
